_help: IMAP email config. Copy to config.json and fill in.
Regular passwords do NOT work — you need an App Password.
3. Create a new app password (name it anything, e.g. 'lingtai')
4. Copy the 16-char password (format: xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx)
5. Add IMAP_PASSWORD=xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx to your .env file
2. Security → App passwords → Create a new app password
4. Set imap_host to imap.outlook.com, smtp_host to smtp.outlook.com
